candidates.text: Europeans - here is how to avoiding tipping in the US without making waiters angry 1. Create a disposable virtual debit card (like Revolut) 2. When the bill comes, you usually pay for the meal first. Use that card to pay for it 3. Immediately after paying, delete your disposable card 4. Then comes the tip.
